name: Chocolate Pizza (3)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Blend in egg and vanilla.
3. Add the combined flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Mix well.
4. Stir in 1/4 cup of M&Ms and 1/4 cup of nuts.
5. Place dough on foil-lined, lightly greased pizza pan, spreading to within 1 1/2 inches from the edge of the pan.
6. Sprinkle "crust" with remaining M&Ms, nuts, marshmallows, and coconut.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 18 to 20 minutes or until edges are set.
8. Cool on pan for 10 minutes.
9. Gently remove pizza with foil liner to wire rack; cool completely.
10. Cut into wedges or squares to serve.
